_comment: Config for tools/check_copy_sync_lockstep.py (Doctrine v11). image_only_assets are non-.py assets brought in by an EXPLICIT per-file Dockerfile COPY that are INTENTIONALLY baked into the HF image and NOT re-mirrored by hf-sync. killinchu's hf-sync.yml mirror-app job mirrors ONLY the .py route modules + serve.py + Dockerfile listed in env.APP_FILES (kept in lockstep with on.push.paths by hand); the served HTML/JS pages and vendored widget blobs below already live resident on the Space and are baked by the Dockerfile build. Each exemption is named EXPLICITLY (reviewed escape hatch, never a silent skip). A NEW per-file served asset that is neither in APP_FILES/on.push.paths nor listed here will FAIL CHECK 3 — that is the guard working.
